commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Baalim. It is the plural number of Baal; for there were divers idols of Baal. (Challoner)
The Jews hence styled Esbaal, Isboseth; as boseth means "confusion "1 Paralipomenon viii. 33.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Baalim: It is the plural number of Baal: for there were divers idols of Baal.
